introSection: Grampus Jet (Japanese: グランパスジェット) is a steel suspended roller coaster manufactured by Vekoma. Since 1994, it is currently operating at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Grampus Jet's layout focuses on turning from one direction to the other, allowing the cars of the train to swing back and forth.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each car of the train is made to look like an killer whale.

fullText:
Grampus Jet (Japanese: グランパスジェット) is a steel suspended roller coaster manufactured by Vekoma. Since 1994, it is currently operating at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

Grampus Jet's layout focuses on turning from one direction to the other, allowing the cars of the train to swing back and forth.

Each car of the train is made to look like an killer whale.
